title: K-200 Battery Design Analysis
text:
# K-200 Battery Design Analysis

Document number: MD-DOC-443-E. Revision: E. Type: design-note. Author: Nina Schulz. Created: 2024-04-06. Last modified: 2024-11-09. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Battery subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1121, P-1019.
